sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this title

special_mechanics.name: Monster Transformation (Super Godzilla)
special_mechanics.description: Godzilla transforms into a more powerful form after collecting serum capsules. The transformation is temporary and provides enhanced attributes for boss battles.

physics_values.note: No specific movement physics documented for transformed state

special_mechanics.name: Energy/Health System
special_mechanics.description: Godzilla's energy level decreases when destroying obstacles or taking enemy attacks. Energy management is a core mechanic during level navigation.

special_mechanics.name: Dual-Screen Layout
special_mechanics.description: Game splits into two screens: top shows Godzilla's actions, bottom shows map with location. Switches to side-view fighting segment during monster battles.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Source material (Wikipedia) provides gameplay overview but contains no quantitative physics parameters, movement speeds, gravity values, or sub-pixel system documentation. Critical reception notes gameplay moves 'too slow' with extensive map-roaming segments. No technical documentation of character physics available.
